## Description

Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this PR. Mention any issue numbers this PR resolves (e.g. `Resolves #42`).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] UI/Style update (tweaks to CSS transitions, animations, alignment)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, walkthrough, licenses)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the manual or automated tests you performed to verify your changes. 
- [ ] Tested on browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari)
- [ ] Verified keyboard-controller navigation feels smooth

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] My changes generate no new build errors
